subcodes.first_line: The remembrance from God unto her who hath hearkened unto the call of her Lord and turned unto God, the Lord of all worlds, that His call may draw her nigh [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ذکر من لدی الله للتی سمعت ندآء ربها و اقبلت الی الله رب العالمین لیقربها ندآء
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual transformation, @praise and encouragement, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @transcendence; unknowability of God, @thankfulness; gratitude
